Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's core concept of 'Boundary-spanning Governance' and its explicit modules on 'Public-private partnership,' 'Inter-organizational cooperation,' and 'Network governance' directly align with fostering multi-stakeholder partnerships for sustainable development (Targets 17.16, 17.17).
